message:
chore(host_resolve): remove unused pthread resolver statics

Clean up 12 statics and accessor functions for pthread operations
that now use native implementations:
- pthread_cancel, setcancelstate, setcanceltype, testcancel
- pthread_kill, sigqueue
- pthread_getcpuclockid, get/setaffinity_np, gettid_np
- pthread_setname_np, getname_np

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
